title: atractocarpus crosbyi
intro: Atractocarpus crosbyi, also known as the 'Crosby's Atractocarpus', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Atractocarpus crosbyi include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Atractocarpus crosbyi is typically prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and benefits.
